description: Agentic commerce + trust MCP: discover, verify, and transact across droplinked's merchant network.
name: com.droplinked.mcp/server

headers.description: droplinked MCP API key. Required for non-read-only tools (process_payment, start_checkout, request_brand_attestation, report_repayment, etc.). Read-only discovery + verification tools (find_merchant, find_inventory, search_products, get_product, list_shop_products, verify_brand_attestation, get_feed) work without one. Request a key from ops@droplinked.com.
headers.name: X-MCP-API-Key

title: droplinked
